name: Santorini
description: This Cyclades island in the Aegean Sea looks like a place straight out of a fairy tale, with candy-colored houses carved into cliffs, sapphire waters, and chalk-white buildings topped with cobalt-blue domes.

name: Tokyo
description: Tokyo is a modern city built on tradition. Soaring skyscrapers sit side by side with perfectly preserved shrines and temples.

name: Madagascar
description: Having parted ways with mainland Africa over 160 million years ago, most of Madagascar's flora and fauna is found nowhere else on earth, including several species of baobabs, most of its 1,000 orchids and – of course – the much-loved lemurs.

name: Rio De Janeiro
description: Rio de Janeiro is one of the most amazing cities to visit in the world. It’s one of the few places that has an intoxicating, care-free energy you can physically feel.  Here you can party til sunrise, sunbathe under colorful umbrellas, surf ocean waves, hike to panoramic views, and dance in the streets with strangers.

name: Iceland
description: Prepare for a trip of a lifetime with 15 unforgettable reasons to visit Iceland. From otherworldly landscapes and majestic nature to unique Icelandic cuisine and thrilling adventures, Iceland has no shortage of wonders. Discover what makes Iceland a top travel destination today and in the years ahead.

name: Bali
description: Bali is a living postcard, an Indonesian paradise that feels like a fantasy. Blessed with a stunning landscape of volcanoes, terraced rice paddies, beaches, and coral reefs, Bali is one of the world's best island destinations.

name: Machu Picchu
description: Machu Picchu is an Incan citadel set high in the Andes Mountains in Peru. Built in the 15th century and later abandoned, it is renowned for its sophisticated dry-stone walls and breathtaking mountain views.

name: Maldives
description: The Maldives is a tropical nation in the Indian Ocean composed of 26 ring-shaped atolls. It is known for its beaches, blue lagoons and extensive reefs. It is the perfect destination for those seeking pure relaxation and luxury.

name: Prague
description: Prague, the capital of the Czech Republic, is a magical city known for its medieval architecture, vibrant nightlife and rich history. The city's Old Town Square, with its famous Astronomical Clock, is a must-see for every visitor.

name: Serengeti
description: The Serengeti National Park is a UNESCO World Heritage Site in Tanzania, famous for its annual wildebeest migration. It is one of the most incredible wildlife destinations in the world, offering unparalleled safari experiences.

name: Osa Peninsula
description: National Geographic named  Peninsula de Osa one of the most “biologically intense” places on the planet, with 2.5% of all biodiversity in the world found there. That was enough to peak my interest when planning my first trip to Costa Rica, as I’m all about wildlife. The more nature the better —and you can’t do better than Osa.

name: Tioga Pass
description: The Serengeti National Park is a UNESCO World Heritage Site in Tanzania, famous for its annual wildebeest migration. It is one of the most incredible wildlife destinations in the world, offering unparalleled safari experiences.

name: Filanda
description: The Serengeti National Park is a UNESCO World Heritage Site in Tanzania, famous for its annual wildebeest migration. It is one of the most incredible wildlife destinations in the world, offering unparalleled safari experiences.

name: Cappadocia
description: Famous for its surreal landscape of fairy chimneys, underground cities and hot air balloon rides at sunrise. Cappadocia is one of the most unique and magical places on Earth.

name: Petra
description: The rose-red city carved directly into cliff faces by the Nabataean people over 2000 years ago. Petra is one of the Seven Wonders of the World and an unforgettable archaeological marvel.

name: Faroe Islands
description: Remote archipelago between Norway and Iceland with dramatic cliffs, cascading waterfalls and endless green valleys. The Faroe Islands feel like a place time forgot — raw, wild and breathtaking.

name: Antelope Canyon
description: A breathtaking slot canyon on Navajo land in Arizona, where light beams pierce through narrow sandstone walls creating otherworldly light shows. One of the most photographed places on the planet.

name: Amalfi Coast
description: A stunning stretch of Italian coastline with colorful villages clinging to dramatic cliffs above the Mediterranean. Lemon groves, crystal waters and world-class cuisine make this one of Europe's most romantic destinations.

name: Ha Long Bay
description: Thousands of limestone karsts and islands rise dramatically from emerald waters in this UNESCO World Heritage Site. Cruising through Ha Long Bay at dawn is one of the most magical experiences in Southeast Asia.

name: Patagonia
description: At the very end of the world lies Patagonia — a vast wilderness of glaciers, jagged peaks and turquoise lakes. Torres del Paine National Park is a trekker's paradise unlike anywhere else on Earth.

name: Marrakech
description: A sensory explosion of color, sound and flavor. Marrakech dazzles with its ancient medina, vibrant souks, ornate palaces and the legendary Jemaa el-Fna square where storytellers and musicians perform nightly.

name: Plitvice Lakes
description: Sixteen terraced lakes connected by a series of waterfalls in stunning shades of turquoise and green. Plitvice Lakes National Park is Croatia's most visited natural wonder and a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

name: Angkor Wat
description: The largest religious monument in the world, hidden deep in the Cambodian jungle. Watching the sunrise over Angkor Wat's iconic towers reflected in the lotus ponds is a moment that stays with you forever.

name: Lofoten Islands
description: Dramatic peaks rising straight from the Arctic Ocean, with colorful fishing villages perched at their feet. In summer enjoy the midnight sun; in winter witness the Northern Lights dancing over frozen fjords.

name: Zanzibar
description: A spice island off the coast of Tanzania with powdery white beaches, crystal-clear turquoise waters and a fascinating Arab-Swahili culture. Stone Town's labyrinthine alleys hide centuries of history and incredible seafood.

name: Bhutan
description: The last Himalayan kingdom, measuring success by Gross National Happiness rather than GDP. Bhutan offers ancient monasteries perched on cliff edges, pristine forests and a culture completely untouched by mass tourism.
